name: Cheese Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the cornmeal, flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt; mix well.
2. Separately beat the eggs with the oil and buttermilk.
3. Add the egg mixture and cheese to the cornmeal mixture, stirring just enough to mix all ingredients well.
4. Spoon the batter into two greased 8 x 12-inch baking pans.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 425 degrees for 20 to 25 minutes or until the cornbread is brown around the edge and firm to the touch.
6. Cut into squares and serve hot.
